mapper.select: SELECT e.*, d.dept_name, p.position_name, u.username AS login_account, '123456' AS login_password, m.username AS manager_no, m.real_name AS manager_name FROM t_employee e LEFT JOIN t_department d ON e.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN t_position p ON e.position_id = p.id LEFT JOIN t_user u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_user m ON e.manager_id = m.id WHERE e.emp_no = #{empNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT e.*, d.dept_name, p.position_name, u.username AS login_account, '123456' AS login_password, m.username AS manager_no, m.real_name AS manager_name FROM t_employee e LEFT JOIN t_department d ON e.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN t_position p ON e.position_id = p.id LEFT JOIN t_user u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_user m ON e.manager_id = m.id WHERE e.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM t_employee WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY emp_no
SELECT * FROM t_employee WHERE manager_id = #{managerId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY emp_no
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_employee (user_id, emp_no, real_name, gender, id_card, phone, dept_id, position_id, manager_id, hire_date, base_salary, bank_account, bank_name, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{e.userId}, #{e.empNo}, #{e.realName}, #{e.gender}, #{e.idCard}, #{e.phone}, #{e.deptId}, #{e.positionId}, #{e.managerId}, #{e.hireDate}, #{e.baseSalary}, #{e.bankAccount}, #{e.bankName}, #{e.status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT d.dept_name as dept_name, COUNT(e.id) as count FROM t_department d LEFT JOIN t_employee e ON d.id = e.dept_id GROUP BY d.dept_name

SELECT e.*, d.dept_name, p.position_name, u.username AS login_account, u.role AS role, '123456' AS login_password, m.username AS manager_no, m.real_name AS manager_name FROM t_employee e LEFT JOIN t_department d ON e.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN t_position p ON e.position_id = p.id LEFT JOIN t_user u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_user m ON e.manager_id = m.id
AND u.role = 2
AND e.emp_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{empNo}, '%')
AND e.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
AND e.dept_id = #{deptId}
AND e.status = #{status}
ORDER BY e.create_time DESC
